title: Why "Variable inlining should make this impossible" error trigered?
body:
https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/552a146f9c5bba7d0ae6075b982f769315e48055/src/V3DfgPasses.cpp#L308

When verilate a verilog file to systemc, I encountered "Variable inlining should make this impossible" error, and it stop at  a variable declaration:
`output wire CXSTXCRDRTNCHK_CXLA_NID72`
what can be the possible reason?
